'''shadate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:riantly|riantly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-d-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:riantly|riantly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shadate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:shadate|shadate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shadatesher|shadatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadatesherĂ«m|shadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shadatero|shadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadateshĂ«|shadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadateshĂ«m|shadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishadatero|gokishadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadateshĂ«|gokishadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadateshĂ«m|gokishadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshadankerom|goshadankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadankeshĂ«|goshadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadankeshĂ«m|goshadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshadankeya|goshadankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shadaterom|shadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadatemu|shadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shadateya|shadateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishadaterom|gokishadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadatemu|gokishadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishadateya|gokishadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shadadate|shadadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shadadatesher|shadadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadadatesherĂ«m|shadadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shadadatero|shadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadadateshĂ«|shadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadadateshĂ«m|shadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishadadatero|gokishadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadadateshĂ«|gokishadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadadateshĂ«m|gokishadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshadadankerom|goshadadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadadankeshĂ«|goshadadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadadankeshĂ«m|goshadadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshadadankeya|goshadadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shadadaterom|shadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadadatemu|shadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shadadateya|shadadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishadadaterom|gokishadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadadatemu|gokishadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishadadateya|gokishadadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠdĂŠte|shĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠdĂŠtesher|shĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠdĂŠtero|shĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠdĂŠtero|gokishĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠdĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠdĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshĂŠdĂŠnkeya|goshĂŠdĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠdĂŠterom|shĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠdĂŠtemu|shĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠdĂŠteya|shĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠdĂŠterom|gokishĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠdĂŠteya|gokishĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafdafte|shafdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shafdaftesher|shafdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafdaftesherĂ«m|shafdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafdaftero|shafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafdafteshĂ«|shafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafdafteshĂ«m|shafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafdaftero|gokishafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafdafteshĂ«|gokishafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafdafteshĂ«m|gokishafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshafdafnkerom|goshafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafdafnkeshĂ«|goshafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafdafnkeshĂ«m|goshafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshafdafnkeya|goshafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafdafterom|shafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafdaftemu|shafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shafdafteya|shafdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafdafterom|gokishafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafdaftemu|gokishafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishafdafteya|gokishafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
